英國英格蘭肯特瓦爾梅
zh.Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Englan: 英國諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓
zh.Calais, Pas-de-Calais, France: 法國帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯
zh.Bishopsbourne, Kent, England: 英國肯特比曉普斯布恩
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Haute於1444年出生在英國肯特比曉普斯布恩時，她的父親William Haute54歲，母親Joan Woodville39歲。她於大約1465年與John Fogge在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1512年8月6日在英國肯特阿福德享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Haute于1444年出生在英国肯特比曉普斯布恩时，她的父亲William Haute54岁，母亲Joan Woodville39岁。她于大约1465年与John Fogge在英国肯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1512年8月6日在英国肯特阿福德享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Haute
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: nickname or status name from an argot word (thieves’ slang) in Bavaria and Austria for a peasant farmer (see   Hotz   1). Compare   Houts   and   Houtz  .

variants.name: Hotz
meanings: South German and Swiss German: from thieves' cant for a peasant or farmer, which in turn derives from an ancient Germanic personal name, Hugizo or Huzo, pet forms of a compound name formed with hug- as the first element (see, for example, Hubert , Hugh ).
South German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German hotzen ‘to run swiftly’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Haute was born in 1444, in Bishopsbourne, Kent, England, her father, William Haute, was 54 and her mother, Joan Woodville, was 39. She married John Fogge about 1465, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 6 August 1512, in Ashford, Kent, England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Haute est née en 1444, à Bishopsbourne, Kent, Angleterre, son père, William Haute, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Joan Woodville, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé John Fogge environ 1465, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 août 1512, à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Haute 1444 in Bishopsbourne, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Haute 54 und ihre Mutter Joan Woodville 39. Sie hat um 1465 in Kent, England John Fogge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. August 1512 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Ashford, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Haute è nata il nel 1444 nel Bishopsbourne, Kent, England, sua padre, William Haute, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Joan Woodville, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato John Fogge circa 1465, nel Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 agosto 1512, nel Ashford, Kent, England, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Hauteが1444年にイギリスケントビショプスボウルンで生まれた時，父William Hauteは54歳，母Joan Woodvilleは39歳であった。約1465年にイギリスケントでJohn Foggeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1512年8月6日にイギリスケントアシュフォードで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Haute(이)가 1444년 영국 켄트 비숍스번에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Haute(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Woodville(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 대략 1465년 영국 켄트에서 John Fogge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1512년 8월 6일 영국 켄트 애스h퍼드에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

Walmer, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Haute nasceu em 1444, em Bishopsbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Haute, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Joan Woodville, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com John Fogge aproximadamente 1465, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de agosto de 1512, em Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Haute родилась в 1444 г. в местности бишопсбурн, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени William Haute было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Woodville, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Fogge около 1465 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 6 августа 1512 г. в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Haute nació en 1444, en Bishopsbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, William Haute, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Joan Woodville, tenía 39 años. Se casó con John Fogge aproximadamente 1465, en Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de agosto de 1512, en Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años.
